resources.string: Add friends in the Social tab to start a chat.
Be the first to share your dive
Add dives in Logbook first, then try again.
The server returned an empty list for your account. Add at least one dive in Logbook, then open this screen again.
No recent dives at this site
Choose where you want to dive.
You can request a specific instructor later from the center.
Add buddies or leave empty to book for yourself only. Email is optional for each extra participant.
Optional — requests, medical info, or other details for the dive center.
Review your choices, then confirm. You will receive a confirmation when the center accepts the booking.
Sign in to book a dive.
Thank you. The dive center will confirm your request. You can track status from Trips when this feature is linked.
Sign in to leave or view reviews.
Could not submit review. Try again.
No photos found in dive logs yet.
No supported tracks in this video
Video processed, but failed to save
Video processed and saved to gallery
You will be added as a participant (MVP — no payment in the app). You can only join once per trip.
Hello! I have booked a trip (%1$s) and would like to confirm the details.
Sign in to reserve a spot on this trip.
Sign in from Profile to reserve a spot on trips.
Tap a row to open the diver profile (when available).
You have no dive centers linked to this account. Use the website or contact support.
End date must be on or after start date.
Description must be at least 5 characters.
Enter a valid number of spots (1–500).
Enter a hotel name for daily trips.
Enter a yacht or boat name for safari trips.
No instructors linked to this center yet.
Same structure as iOS `program` — JSON array of day objects. Use [] if none.
JSON array of expense objects, or [].
Use gallery upload (saved via server) or paste one http(s) URL per line.
Program days must be valid JSON array.
Additional expenses must be valid JSON array.
Add one card per day (YYYY-MM-DD). Matches the iOS trip program structure.
Paste a public trip page URL. A new trip is created for the selected dive center (same as iOS).
Each program day needs a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD).
No courses for this dive center. Add courses on the backend or website.
Room beds total (%1$d) exceed trip spots (%2$d).
Cabin berths total (%1$d) exceed trip spots (%2$d).
Check room type, count (≥1), and prices (numbers ≥0).
Check cabin type, count (≥1), and prices (numbers ≥0).
Organizer (dive center) cannot be changed when editing.
This cannot be undone. The trip must have no bookings.
This trip has bookings. Remove participants on the server or cancel bookings before deleting.
Help and FAQ will appear here. Contact support through the website if you need urgent assistance.
No notifications yet. Trip updates and friend activity will show here when available.
App preferences and account options. More controls are coming in a future update.
Your dive statistics will be summarized here once we connect this screen to your logbook data.
Achievements and badges will appear here as you log dives and explore sites.
Here is a quick guide to the main areas of the app. For account or billing issues, use the website or contact support.
Browse dive sites, centers, and shops. Switch between list and map, use filters, and open a place to read details and reviews.
Log your dives with depth, time, and photos. Your entries power statistics and achievements in your profile.
Open Trips from your profile or the More menu to browse scheduled group trips and open a trip for details.
Change your password from Profile or Settings. Sign out from Profile. Partner roles can open the API site in a browser for full admin tools.
Run a dive center or retail shop? Submit a public application for verification. You can do this without logging in; use the same form from the login screen.
DiveHub connects your dives, friends, and trips. More settings will arrive in future updates.
No notifications yet. Booking updates and messages will appear here.
You logged ten or more dives.
Reach 10 logged dives (local or profile total).
Log a dive with max depth ≥ 30 m.
Log a dive with max depth ≥ 40 m.
Accumulate 50 hours of logged bottom time.
Attach photos to at least one dive log.
Shop tools in the app are limited. Manage products, orders, and analytics in the web admin.
Partner tools are not fully available in the mobile app yet. Use the web admin for full management.
Use Trips to browse scheduled trips. Alerts opens your notification inbox. Full admin, shop, and instructor workflows stay on the website for now.
Your assigned trips and slots appear under Schedule. Create a trip from there when you manage a center, or use More for shortcuts.
Map, dive log, and social tabs like a regular diver account.
No dive centers linked to this account for trip management. Use the website or ask a super admin to assign you.
Browse all public trips from the Trips tab, create departures for your centers, and open Notifications for alerts. Full booking calendar and staff tools remain on the web.
Under each center, open instructors or trips organized by that center only.
No instructors are linked to this center yet.
No gear items for this filter yet.
No bookings for this filter yet.
No managed centers found for this account.
Trips lists shared departures you can promote or join from the app. Catalog, checkout, and shop analytics are on the web.
No shop is linked to this account. Ask an administrator to assign a shop.
Submit your dive center or shop for review. No account is required; you will be contacted after verification.
Submit your dive center for review. Fill in location and contact details so we can verify and onboard your center.
Latitude and longitude are required for a dive center.
Latitude and longitude are required for a physical shop.
Coordinates are optional for an online-only shop.
Phone must be at least 5 characters.
Country must be at least 2 characters.
City must be at least 2 characters.
Latitude and longitude are required for this type.
I confirm that I have read the DiveHub Privacy Policy and User Agreement and accept their terms, including personal data processing.
The full documents are on the DiveHub website. Use the links below to open them in the browser.
You must accept the documents and personal data processing.
Trip updates, messages, and system notices appear in Notifications.
This action is irreversible. Type DELETE to confirm and optionally enter your current password.
For security, deletion requires your current password or a recent sign-in session.
Emulator: 10.0.2.2 is your computer\'s localhost. Device: use your computer\'s LAN IP, port 3000.
First and last name are required
Enter at least 2 characters to search.
Search across dive sites and people. Tap Search when ready.
This dive center could not be loaded.
This shop could not be loaded.
This screen is not available in the app yet. More options will be added in a future update.
Subscription management is aimed at diver accounts.
Billing integration is not connected yet. You can still activate PRO locally for testing (same as the iOS demo flow).
Your account will be marked as cancelled locally until billing APIs are wired (same placeholder behavior as iOS).
No certifications yet. Tap + to add one.
No gear profiles yet. Tap + to create a saved set of sizes.
Depth and temperature will display in the selected system (matches iOS).
Values will follow the new units wherever the app shows depth and temperature.
Courses for your first managed dive center (same flow as iOS).
No courses yet. Add courses from the web admin or API.
Platform overview and server health (iOS Admin analytics).
Error stats require elevated permissions on the server.
Calendar and list views (bookings sync when connected to the booking API).
Pick a date, then review items for that day below.
No bookings for this day yet.
Underwater photo and video tools — same entry point as on iOS.
Product catalog UI matches iOS; connect shop commerce APIs to populate live data.
Orders list matches iOS layout phase — wire shop order endpoints when available.
You don’t have permission for this action
Data conflict. Refresh and try again.
Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
Server error. Please try again later.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
No internet connection. Check Wi‑Fi or mobile data.
Create your DiveHub account to save dives, track certifications, and find dive sites.
Sign in to DiveHub to continue.
I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
Set a new password to continue using your account.
Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 8 characters
Password must contain at least one letter and one number
Apple Sign In on Android is not configured in this build.
Google Sign In is not configured in this build (add Web client ID in Firebase).
